title: dolichos helicopus
intro: Dolichos helicopus, also known as the wild bean or buffalo bean, is a type of climbing plant native to tropical Africa and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and saponins. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Dolichos helicopus is often prepared as a herbal decoction or infusion, which can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical application for its medicinal properties.
